file: 1242_Wan 等 - 2020 - Tunable Production of Jet-Fuel Range Alkanes and Aromatics by Catalytic Pyrolysis of LDPE over Bioma.txt

experiments.description: 在双温区管式炉中，使用不同条件下制备的玉米芯衍生活性炭（AC）催化剂，对低密度聚乙烯（LDPE）进行催化热解，以生产喷气燃料范围的烷烃和芳烃。实验变量包括催化剂的制备条件（碳化温度、磷酸与玉米芯的比例）、催化温度（400-600°C）以及催化剂与LDPE的比例（0-1.5）。产物通过GC-MS和GC进行分析，以确定液体和气体的组成和产率。
experiments.text_snippet: The ex-situ catalytic pyrolysis process was performed in a double-temperature-zone tube furnace... pyrolysis of LDPE and catalytic conversion of pyrolysis gas took place in two separate parts in the quartz tube... The LDPE (3 g) was placed on one side of the quartz tube... The AC catalyst was also fixed on the other side of the quartz tube... Each catalytic pyrolysis lasted for 10 min at the set temperature.

Catalyst composition.original: Corncob-derived activated carbon, activated with phosphoric acid (H3PO4)

Reaction temperature.original: 400-600 °C (catalytic temperature); LDPE pyrolysis temperature fixed at 500 °C

Operation mode.value: Fixed-bed, double temperature zone tube furnace (ex-situ catalytic pyrolysis)
Operation mode.original: Fixed-bed, double temperature zone tube furnace (ex-situ catalytic pyrolysis)

Catalyst loading.value: Mass ratio of catalyst to LDPE: 0-1.5
Catalyst loading.original: Mass ratio of catalyst to LDPE: 0-1.5

Product yield.original: {'Liquid yield': '42.0-86.7 wt% (depending on conditions)', 'Gas yield': '13.3-43.3 wt% (depending on conditions)', 'Coke yield': '1.3-21.3 wt% (depending on conditions)'}

Product Selectivity.original: {'Highest jet fuel-range hydrocarbons': '93.13 area%', 'Highest alkanes in liquid': '48.21 area% (AC6 catalyst)', 'Highest aromatics in liquid': '59.21 area% (AC7 catalyst)', 'Highest hydrogen in gas': '76.46 vol%'}
